name: Gloves of Tantalizing Touch
descrip: These elegant silken black gloves are perfectly designed for giving expert massages. Increases Allure by 10, and the Arousal you deal with Foreplay skills by 20%. Additionally, hitting an enemy with a Foreplay skill decreases their defense by 10% for 3 turns (this effect can stack with itself, and combines with similar effects). Finally, you regain 5% of your Energy every time you use a Foreplay skill.
